metadata.description: Portfolio project reference for Damian Rusek
metadata.author: Damian Rusek

projects.name: Bank Churn Prediction & Customer Insights
projects.description: Customer churn prediction and analytics project using Python, scikit-learn, and Tableau.
projects.summary: Built a churn prediction project on 10,000+ customer records using Python and scikit-learn. Performed exploratory analysis to identify churn drivers and created Tableau dashboards to highlight KPIs and high-risk customer segments.
keyFeatures: Exploratory data analysis on customer churn drivers
Segment analysis for high-risk customer groups

projects.name: Fighting Fit – MMA Fight Outcomes Prediction
projects.description: Machine learning project analyzing MMA fight outcomes using Python, MySQL, and Tableau.
projects.summary: Developed an end-to-end analytics project to predict MMA fight outcomes using 6,500+ fight records. Built a Random Forest model, engineered 15+ features, and created Tableau dashboards to analyze fighter trends and win probability patterns.
keyFeatures: Random Forest model with 64% accuracy and 0.71 F1-score
15+ engineered features including age, reach, and betting odds differentials
MySQL database for structured storage and querying
Tableau dashboards for fighter comparisons and win trends

projects.name: NYC Airbnb Pricing & Demand Analysis
projects.description: Analytics project exploring Airbnb pricing and demand patterns across New York City.
projects.summary: Analyzed 48,000+ Airbnb listings using SQL, Excel, and Tableau to identify pricing and occupancy trends across neighborhoods and property types. Built views and dashboards to support revenue optimization insights.
keyFeatures: Built SQL views for pricing and occupancy analysis
Identified strong occupancy trends in mid-priced listings
Created Tableau dashboards for business insights

projects.name: End-to-End E-Commerce Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: End-to-end e-commerce analytics project focused on revenue trends, customer behavior, and dashboard reporting.
projects.summary: Built an analytics project to evaluate e-commerce revenue performance using SQL, Python, and dashboarding tools. Focused on trend analysis, customer behavior, KPI reporting, and business recommendations for revenue optimization.
